logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Loading gchat skill for Google Chat sync

thoughts: User wants me to load the 'gchat' skill and let it run autonomously for 5-15 minutes.
The task requires Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223 with Google Chat in 3-panel view.
I need to use skills_tool:load to activate the gchat skill first.
After loading, I should wait for completion and then trigger notify-user with success or failure message.
kvps.headline: Loading gchat skill for Google Chat sync

The skill auto-detects days (3-5 depending on day of week) and defaults to 200 max threads.
I need to execute the Python script at /a0/usr/skills/gchat/scripts/gchat.py to start the sync process.
This will take 5-15 minutes, so I should run it and then wait for completion using code_execution_tool with output polling.
The user specified Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223 which matches the default CDP URL in the skill.
kvps.headline: Executing gchat.py script to start Google Chat sync

It's at step [Fetching 1/24] for 'Shopping Cart Notification'. The process will take 5-15 minutes as specified.

Once it completes (looking for COMPLETED marker), I'll load notify-user skill and send success message pointing to /a0/usr/workdir/gchat-output.md
